Name: BULLET_PARAM_ST
Description: Governs motion, hitbox and appearance of projetiles. Can reference AtkParam for damage.

Fields.Name: AtkParam ID
Fields.Description: Register each attack parameter ID.  Attack type / Attack material / Physical attack power / Magic attack power / Stamina attack power / Knockback distance.

Fields.Name: Projectile SFX ID
Fields.Description: Enter the SFX ID for [Bullet]. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Impact SFX ID
Fields.Description: [Impact] Enter the SFX ID. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Repel SFX ID
Fields.Description: [At the time of repelling] Enter the SFX ID. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Time for missiles to continue to exist (-1 is infinite).

Fields.Name: Attenuation Range
Fields.Description: Distance at which attenuation begins (not actual flight distance).

Fields.Name: Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: Specify how many seconds the missile will be fired.

Fields.Name: Gravity: In Range
Fields.Description: Downward gravity within range.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward when damping begins (expresses the feeling of falling down.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Range
Fields.Description: The distance to the target to stop the guidance. A parameter that prevents you from hitting too much with a guided bullet.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: Initial speed of SFX.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: In Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration within SFX range.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration when SFX goes out of range.

Fields.Name: Max Velocity
Fields.Description: maximum speed.

Fields.Name: Min Velocity
Fields.Description: Minimum guaranteed speed.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Duration
Fields.Description: Until this time, do not accelerate (make sure you can shoot magic like rockets).

Fields.Name: Homing Start Distance
Fields.Description: How many meters should the guidance start?

Fields.Name: Initial Hit Radius
Fields.Description: Set the radius of the hit ball.

Fields.Name: Final Hit Radius
Fields.Description: Maximum radius of the hit sphere (If -1, make it the same as the initial radius / default)

Fields.Name: Radius Spread Time
Fields.Description: The time when the radius of the range expands to a small extent.

Fields.Name: Expansion Delay
Fields.Description: Time from landing to expand (if 0, it expands immediately).

Fields.Name: Homing Offset Range
Fields.Description: It is accurate if it is 0. At the time of shooting, each component of XYZ should be aimed by shifting this amount.

Fields.Name: Damage Hit Duration
Fields.Description: Damage hit history survival time [sec] ( 0.0f: indefinite)

Fields.Name: External Force in Bullet Direction
Fields.Description: External force applied in the direction of shooting. (Y-axis is removed)

Fields.Name: Shooter SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effects on the person who shot

Fields.Name: Bullet AI
Fields.Description: Parameters used by the funnel to search for the target

Fields.Name: Hit Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Specify the ID when generating a new bullet parameter from the bullet parameter

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [0]
Fields.Description: Register each special effect parameter ID.  General special effects.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [1]
Fields.Description: Register each special effect parameter ID.  General special effects.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [2]
Fields.Description: Register each special effect parameter ID.  General special effects.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [3]
Fields.Description: Register each special effect parameter ID.  General special effects.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID [4]
Fields.Description: Register each special effect parameter ID.  General special effects.

Fields.Name: Bullet Count
Fields.Description: The number of missiles fired at one time.

Fields.Name: Homing Angle
Fields.Description: How many corrections per second? ..

Fields.Name: Launch Angle
Fields.Description: Specify how many times the missile is fired forward.

Fields.Name: Launch Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple missiles, specify how often to fire them. (Y-axis)

Fields.Name: Launch Elevation Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple missiles, specify how often to fire them. (X-axis)

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Physical
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Magic
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Fire
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Stamina
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Knockback
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Launch Elevation Angle
Fields.Description: Additional elevation angle from the horizontal.

Fields.Name: Lock Direction Limit Angle
Fields.Description: Limit angle when facing the lock direction

Fields.Name: Previous Velocity Direction Rate
Fields.Description: Ratio to add the previous movement direction to the current direction when the sliding bullet hits the wall

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Set the physical attributes to set for the bullet

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Set special attributes to set for bullets

Fields.Name: Material Attack Type
Fields.Description: Specify what the attack attribute is

Fields.Name: Material Attack Material
Fields.Description: Used for SFX / SE during attack

Fields.Name: Is Penetrate Character
Fields.Description: If it is ON, it will penetrate without landing when it hits the character.

Fields.Name: Is Penetrate Object
Fields.Description: If it is ON, it will penetrate without landing when hitting a dynamic / partial destruction asset.

Fields.Name: Launch Condition Type
Fields.Description: Specify the condition to judge whether to generate a bullet when it lands or the life is extinguished

Fields.Name: Follow Type
Fields.Description: Follow-up type. Do not follow is the default.

Fields.Name: Emitter Source Type
Fields.Description: Source type. Usually from Damipoli. (Introduced to judge meteo)

Fields.Name: Is Persistent Attack SFX
Fields.Description: Set whether bullets such as arrows will remain stuck in the character

Fields.Name: Is Continuous Hit
Fields.Description: Do you keep hitting?

Fields.Name: Is Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: If it is ON, it will penetrate without landing when hitting a hit / static asset.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Both Teams
Fields.Description: Are you an enemy or an ally? (Not a wandering ghost)

Fields.Name: Is Use Shared Hit List
Fields.Description: Specify whether to share the hit list

Fields.Name: Use Multiple Dummy Polys for Placement
Fields.Description: Do you use the same Damipoly ID more than once when placing bullets?

Fields.Name: Force Erase Bullet A if Hit by Other Bullet
Fields.Description: Does it hit other bullets forced erasure A?

Fields.Name: Force Erase Bullet B if Hit by Other Bullet
Fields.Description: Does it hit the other bullet forced erasure B?

Fields.Name: Is Bullet deflected by Magic
Fields.Description: Do you hit the force magic?

Fields.Name: Is SFX ignored on Water Hit
Fields.Description: Should I ignore the effect if it hits the surface of the water?

Fields.Name: Is Move State Ignored on Water Hit
Fields.Description: Whether to ignore the state transition even if it hits water

Fields.Name: Is Bullet deflected by Bullet Deflection
Fields.Description: Do you hit the dark force magic?

Fields.Name: Damage Calculation Side
Fields.Description: Damage calculation side. During multiplayer, the damage calculation is for switching between the giving side and the receiving side.

Fields.Name: Is Auto Homing Enabled
Fields.Description: Whether to automatically follow when not locked on

Fields.Name: Is Emitter Source Synced with Bullet
Fields.Description: In the case of a synchronously generated bullet, the emitter attitude at the time of synchronization is used without recalculating the attitude due to the Damipoli position when the bullet is generated.

Fields.Name: Is Direction Inherited by Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Only valid for sub-bullets. If it is ON, the reference direction is the owner.

Fields.Name: Is SFX Inherited by Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Take over the SFX of the parent bullet. Ignore the SFX ID set for the sub bullet

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Holy
Fields.Description: Correction value that decreases in 1 second after the attenuation distance.

Fields.Name: Bullet SFX Delete Type - By Hit
Fields.Description: Bullet SFX extinction type when landing or playing

Fields.Name: Bullet SFX Delete Type - By Expiration
Fields.Description: Bullet SFX extinction type at the end of life

Fields.Name: Target Vertical Offset
Fields.Description: Vertical offset of landing position. Shift the target position up and down at the time of launch and during homing. (-N ~ n)

Fields.Name: Random Launch Angle - Max
Fields.Description: Upper limit of random number of firing angle (0 to 360)

Fields.Name: Random Elevation Angle - Max
Fields.Description: Upper limit of firing elevation random number (0 to 360)

Fields.Name: Bullet Emitter: Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Bullet ID used when making bullets at regular intervals

Fields.Name: Bullet Emitter: Minimum Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: Minimum interval for making bullets at regular intervals (0 to n)

Fields.Name: Bullet Emitter: Maximum Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: Maximum interval for making bullets at regular intervals (function is disabled if 0 to n 0)

Fields.Name: Prediction Shoot Observe Time
Fields.Description: Average speed observation time of predicted shooting function (function is invalid if 0 to 40)

Fields.Name: Bullet Emitter: Initial Wait Time
Fields.Description: Waiting time to start making bullets at regular intervals

Fields.Name: SFX Posture Type
Fields.Description: Set the initial attitude of an SFX or sub-bullet created from a bullet

Fields.Name: Create Limit Group ID
Fields.Description: If it is 0, it is unused. If the upper limit is reached when creating a bullet set in the same group Id, that bullet will not be created. (Bullets created synchronously on the network will be released regardless)

Fields.Name: Is Speed Inherited by Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Take over the speed of the timing to replace the submunition. Ignore the speed set for the submunition

Fields.Name: Is SFX Disabled on Chr/Object Hit
Fields.Description: When ON, the bullet parameter landing SFX does not play even if it hits a character / object.

Fields.Name: Is Wall Checked by Center Ray
Fields.Description: There was a problem with the digging judgment when firing a bullet, so it is for error handling. SEQ23101 [Own character] If you use a soul short arrow or a strong soul short arrow in close contact with a character with a high lock-on position, the direction of the bullet will be reversed.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Flare
Fields.Description: Do you hit flare magic?

Fields.Name: Is Bullet Wall Filter Used
Fields.Description: Do you use primitive magic Atari? It will change to a filter that corresponds to the Atari dedicated to primitive magic.

Fields.Name: Is Follow Bullet Count not scaled by INT
Fields.Description: The number of funnels on the PC does not fluctuate by force. Become the number of shots

Fields.Name: Is AI Interrupted by Bullet
Fields.Description: Does it react to AI bullets (even with 0 attack power)?

Fields.Name: Emitter Source Radius
Fields.Description: The range of bullets used when the source type is set to occur at random locations.

Fields.Name: Follow Bullet - Height Offset
Fields.Description: Funnel tracking position_base point height [m]

Fields.Name: Asset Generated on Hit
Fields.Description: The number of the asset to be generated at the time of landing. -1: Do not generate. The asset number is the last 6 digits of the asset. Example: AEG999_999 = 999999

Fields.Name: Duration - Random Range
Fields.Description: Add a random number of seconds with a set time fluctuation range to the lifetime [s].

Fields.Name: Homing Angle: X
Fields.Description: Only the X-axis component of the inductive performance is changed. Do not change with -1

Fields.Name: Ballistic Calculation Type
Fields.Description: Initial shoot direction

Fields.Name: Attach Effect Type
Fields.Description: Effect type to attach

Fields.Name: Insert SE ID - Bullet [1]
Fields.Description: Insert SE ID1 for [Bullet]. -1: Not generated 9 digits. Sound type is fixed to s: SFX.

Fields.Name: Insert SE ID - Bullet [2]
Fields.Description: Insert SE ID 2 for [Bullet]. -1: Not generated 9 digits. Sound type is fixed to s: SFX.

Fields.Name: Insert SE ID - Hit
Fields.Description: Insert SE ID 1 for [landing]. -1 does not occur. 9 digits. Sound type is fixed to s: SFX.

Fields.Name: Insert SE ID - Repel
Fields.Description: [At the time of repelling] Enter SE ID1 for. -1 does not occur. 9 digits. Sound type is fixed to s: SFX.

Fields.Name: Howitzer - Launch Elevation Limit - Min
Fields.Description: [Curly fire] The lower limit [deg] with the firing elevation angle as a reference (0 deg) before applying the curve fire calculation.

Fields.Name: Howitzer - Launch Elevation Limit - Max
Fields.Description: [Sky firing] The upper limit [deg] based on the firing elevation angle (0deg) before applying the bending firing calculation.

Fields.Name: Howitzer - Initial Min Velocity
Fields.Description: [Song firing] The minimum speed limit for song firing calculation [m / s].

Fields.Name: Howitzer - Initial Max Velocity
Fields.Description: [Song firing] Maximum speed limit for song firing calculation [m / s].

Fields.Name: SFX ID - Force Erase
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of forced erasure. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Bullet SFX Delete Type - By Force Erase
Fields.Description: Bullet SFX extinction type at the time of forced erasure

Fields.Name: Follow Bullet - Dummy Poly for SFX Pose
Fields.Description: SFX direction specification when following Damipoli

Fields.Name: Follow Bullet - Radius Offset
Fields.Description: Funnel tracking position_radius [m]

Fields.Name: SpEffect Bullet Distance - Magnification
Fields.Description: Special effect flight distance correction magnification

Fields.Name: Target Range when Unlocked
Fields.Description: Target range when unlocked (-1: Refer to range, 0: No target)
